title: tragacantha mesoptera
side_effects: Tragacantha mesoptera can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, diarrhea, and vomiting. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to cardiovascular problems, including increased heart rate and blood pressure. In rare cases, it may cause allergic reactions, resulting in symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Improper use of this plant can also lead to kidney damage and interact negatively with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
